Interface TransferService

All Known Implementing Classes:
TransferServiceImpl
public interface TransferService
Handles inter-shelter animal transfers, including creating and resolving transfer requests. Implementations must verify animal availability and update shelter records upon approval.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    approve(TransferRequest request)
    Approves a pending transfer request and moves the animal between shelters.
    void
    dismiss(TransferRequest request)
    Dismisses a pending transfer request without approving or rejecting it.
    List<TransferRequest>
    getPendingRequests(Shelter shelter)
    Returns all pending transfer requests involving the given shelter, either as source or destination.
    List<TransferRequest>
    listAll()
    Returns every transfer request currently persisted in the system.
    void
    reject(TransferRequest request)
    Rejects a pending transfer request without moving the animal.
    TransferRequest
    requestTransfer(Animal animal, Shelter from, Shelter to)
    Creates and submits a transfer request to move an animal from one shelter to another.

  • Method Details

    • requestTransfer

      TransferRequest requestTransfer(Animal animal, Shelter from, Shelter to)
      Creates and submits a transfer request to move an animal from one shelter to another. Throws an exception if the animal is not present in the source shelter or the destination is full.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to transfer
      from - the source shelter currently holding the animal
      to - the destination shelter to receive the animal
      Returns:
      the created transfer request

    • approve

      void approve(TransferRequest request)
      Approves a pending transfer request and moves the animal between shelters. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      request - the transfer request to approve

    • reject

      void reject(TransferRequest request)
      Rejects a pending transfer request without moving the animal. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      request - the transfer request to reject

    • dismiss

      void dismiss(TransferRequest request)
      Dismisses a pending transfer request without approving or rejecting it. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      request - the transfer request to dismiss

    • getPendingRequests

      List<TransferRequest> getPendingRequests(Shelter shelter)
      Returns all pending transfer requests involving the given shelter, either as source or destination. Returns an empty list if the shelter has no pending transfer requests.
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to query
      Returns:
      a list of pending transfer requests involving the shelter

    • listAll

      List<TransferRequest> listAll()
      Returns every transfer request currently persisted in the system. Returns an empty list if no transfers have been requested. Used by the presentation layer to render a full snapshot of the transfer queue.
      Returns:
      a list of all transfer requests
